items.name: Long Wavy Fluffy Curly High Ponytail Brown
items.description:
More versions - https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=curly+ponytail&Category=18&Subcategory=20&CreatorName=Manwire+NOVA&salesTypeFilter=1

More Manwire NOVA here - https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Manwire+NOVA&salesTypeFilter=1

Long Wavy Fluffy Curly High Ponytail Brown combines soft volume with elegant flow in a dreamy, high-tied style. Featuring long, wavy strands with fluffy curls and a lifted ponytail, this brown hairstyle brings a perfect mix of cute, glamorous, and anime-inspired charm.

items.name: PET LIGER -  LOVE HEELS (Bubblegum)
items.description: The legendary LOVE HEELS, adored and shared across the world, arrive on Roblox for the first time ever in this stunning LIMITED EDITION Bubblegum colorway. These vibrant heels glow with soft, floating heart effects, giving your avatar a magical, romantic flair. Perfect for cute, elegant, or fantasy-inspired outfits, these heels make every step feel special.
